top_signals.title: Nasdaq 100 Soars as Chipmaker Rebound Overshadows Iran War
top_signals.summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index advanced on Tuesday as a rebound in chipmakers at the center of the artificial-intelligence trade overshadowed the re-escalation in the US-Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How startups are reshaping the Pentagon’s drone industry
top_signals.summary: Experts say the Drone Dominance competition reflects a broader shift in how the Pentagon acquires military technology and cultivates defense startups.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: First Green Methanol Bunkering of New Car Carrier Successfully Completed
top_signals.summary: EUKOR Car Carriers, SIPG Energy, and World Fuel have successfully completed the first green methanol bunkering of M/V Arctic Tern, the first vessel in the new Shaper Class series of car carriers, at the Port of Shanghai.The operation involved the delivery of 2…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tokyo-area condo prices hit record high in first half of 2026
top_signals.summary: The average price of new condominiums in the Tokyo metropolitan area rose 13.1% from a year before to ¥101.35 million.
